title: MANGA NGE That thing inside Eva Unit 01
display_title: MANGA NGE That thing inside Eva Unit 01
wikitext:
[]: [NGE] That thing inside Eva Unit-01.             Quote Post by The Goose » Fri Feb 02, 2007 7:05 am What is that thing in Eva Unit 01? During Shinji's first fight with an angel, he blacks out and is confronted by a black creature with a missing eye. Later, it appears again when hes inside Eva Unit 01. At first it takes the form of his mom and then it reveals it itself to him. Once it even appears to Rei during her time inside the Eva. What could that thing be?

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Fri Feb 02, 2007 7:41 am it's what Sadamoto looks like in his Final Battle Form.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Feb 02, 2007 7:44 am It's supposed to be EVA-01 without the 'armor' covering her. One word: DODGY. MaggotMeister wrote: it's what Sadamoto looks like in his Final Battle Form.

[]:             Quote Post by ORAMI!? » Fri Feb 02, 2007 8:21 am Saturday Nerv Live wrote: <Nerv goon #1 wanders on-screen, looks straight at the unmasked Eva-01 inquisitively with a dumb look on his face> Nerv goon #1: What the hell is that?! <squints> What the hell is that? <chuckling> What's that danged thing doing here! How did that get here? What the hell is that?! <squints> What the hell is that?! How'd that dang deal get here?! <turns toward off-screen> Hey! Come on over here and look at this deal! <Nerv goon #2 wanders on screen to take a bewildered look> Nerv goon #2: What the hell is that? Nerv goon #1: I don't know what the hell that is! Nerv goon #2: What in the hell is that?! Nerv goon #1: Hey, you kids! Get away from there! Nerv goon #2: I would not mess with that thing.. Nerv goon #1: Don't put your lips on it! Nerv goon #2: <ever curious> What the hell is this? Nerv goon #1: Well.. get a photo of me with it, anyway! <Nerv goon #1 hands camera to Nerv goon #2, then walks away from camera view to have his picture taken> Nerv goon #2: Be careful with that thing. <snaps Nerv goon #1's picture, as spark of ingenuity appears on his face> Oh, I know what that is! Nerv goon #1: <returns next to Tourist #2> Well, what the hell is it?! Nerv goon #2: <looks closer> What is that thing..? Nerv goon #1: I don't even care what it is. <pause> What the hell is that?! Nerv goon #2: I don't know what the hell that thing is. Nerv goon #1: Oh, I know what it is! Nerv goon #2: <seeing it> Oh, yeah.. oh yeah.. <chuckles> <Nerv goons #1 & #2 walk away from the unmasked Eva-01. <pause> then they turn back towards it, more inquisitive than ever.> Nerv goon #1: What the hell was that?!

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Fri Feb 02, 2007 9:52 am It can't be the Eva itself, perhaps its just another form of Yui?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Feb 02, 2007 10:39 am The Goose wrote: It can't be the Eva itself, perhaps its just another form of Yui?

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Fri Feb 02, 2007 11:39 am So your saying that Sadamoto shows the human (Yui) and machine (Unit-01) with the creature? Good point. But later Yui, herself in soul form (long hair and glowing features), appears to Shinji after the creature's attack. So if Yui and the Eva are truly one in the form of the creature, why does Yui alone appear?

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Fri Feb 02, 2007 12:03 pm I thought the idea was that Sadamoto had the rather retarded notion that the Eva had it's own soul (or will, or mind, or something...:roll: ), besides that of Yui

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Fri Feb 02, 2007 12:06 pm Thats how I felt too. Correct me if I'm wrong, but doesn't the creature (I love saying that!) ask Rei, while she's praying, why she is trying to bring Shinji out of the Eva?

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Fri Feb 02, 2007 12:13 pm I was also under the impression that Sadamoto's version of Eva 01 has it's own soul, besides Yui's. Bah, wasn't it complicated enough in the Anime?

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Fri Feb 02, 2007 6:55 pm I looked up the manga and the creatures doesn't say anything about Shinji being its son. So it can't be Yui. Rei says that this "Stripped Eva" was once part of her in the past so first we need to trace this relation. Could it be Lillith perhaps? Unit-01 is derived from her but the question still remains: How is it related to Rei?

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sat Feb 03, 2007 1:01 am Well, Rei comes from Lilith also, so that would be where her connection to Unit 01 comes from.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sat Feb 03, 2007 1:40 am Heres Rei's full conversation with the creature: Rei: I am you. You are myself. You are what used to be me. Creature: Yes, you are me. I am what you used to be. So then. Why? Why do you interfere? Though we must remember that Uni-01 is a clone of Lilith. The Eva can't be self aware without a soul. Yui is the soul of the machine. The creature who lurks inside must be another soul.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Feb 03, 2007 8:35 am The Goose wrote: Though we must remember that Uni-01 is a clone of Lilith. The Eva can't be self aware without a soul. Yui is the soul of the machine. The creature who lurks inside must be another soul.

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Sat Feb 03, 2007 9:11 am The Eva Monkey wrote: The Goose wrote: It can't be the Eva itself, perhaps its just another form of Yui?

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sat Feb 03, 2007 10:58 am Katayoku no Tenshi, I'm confused what your trying to say.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Feb 03, 2007 12:42 pm The Goose wrote: Katayoku no Tenshi, I'm confused what your trying to say.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sat Feb 03, 2007 1:15 pm Timstuff wrote: Well, Rei comes from Lilith also, so that would be where her connection to Unit 01 comes from.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Feb 03, 2007 4:27 pm The Goose wrote: Yeah, but she doesn't come from Unit-01. It doesn't make sense to say that she is the former Unit-01. My only guess on the creature is that its Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Mon Feb 05, 2007 1:23 pm That scene was most likely done that way to symbolically illustrate the connection between Yui and the eva.
